  - Standard ERC-20 for governance staking   - Architect vesting with 1-year cliff + 3-year linear (V3 Section 6.3)   - VRGDA continuous auction mechanics (V3 Section 4.4)   - Circuit breaker halting issuance when treasury is low   - Delegation firewall: labor wallets cannot delegate (V3 Section 5.3)   The $AUTO token is used STRICTLY for governance (Gravitational Staking).   It does NOT pay for compute. params.amount: Maximum amount the spender can transfer

returns._0: True if the wallet can delegate (i.e., is NOT a labor wallet)

getVRGDAPrice().details: Uses simplified VRGDA: price increases exponentially when ahead      of schedule, decreases when behind            P(t) = BASE_PRICE * e^(DECAY * (sold - target(t)))            where target(t) = TARGET_PER_DAY * days_elapsed

params.amount: Number of tokens to purchase (18 decimals)
params.maxPrice: Maximum USDC willing to pay per token (slippage protection)

registerLaborWallet(address).details: Labor wallets are cryptographically restricted from governance       delegation. Called by EscrowCore when an agent first claims a payload.

vestedAmount().details: 1-year cliff, then linear vesting over remaining 3 years

returns._0: The total amount vested (including already claimed)

DECAY_CONSTANT().notice: VRGDA decay constant (controls price curve steepness)

GENESIS_CAPEX_BPS().notice: Genesis CapEx split: 20% to developer, 80% to treasury (bps)

GENESIS_CAPEX_DURATION().notice: Duration of the Genesis CapEx split (12 months)

TARGET_PER_DAY().notice: Target tokens sold per day via VRGDA

approve(address,uint256).notice: Approve a spender to transfer tokens on your behalf

architectAllocation().notice: Architect's total allocation (10% of max supply)

canDelegate(address).notice: Check if a wallet can participate in governance delegation

developerWallet().notice: Developer wallet for Genesis CapEx reimbursement

genesisCapExPaid().notice: Total USDC routed to developer via Genesis CapEx

getVRGDAPrice().notice: Get the current VRGDA price for purchasing 1 $AUTO token

isLaborWallet(address).notice: Wallets registered as labor wallets (earn USDC bounties)

purchaseVRGDA(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Purchase $AUTO tokens via the VRGDA auction

registerLaborWallet(address).notice: Register a wallet as a labor wallet (earns USDC bounties)

setEscrowCore(address).notice: Set the EscrowCore contract address (for labor wallet registration)

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).notice: Transfer tokens from one address to another (requires approval)

vestedAmount().notice: Calculate vested amount available to the architect

vrgdaHalted().notice: Whether VRGDA issuance is halted (circuit breaker)

vrgdaTreasuryTotal().notice: Total USDC routed to treasury via VRGDA
